rewards.displayCategory: Airtel recharges and bill payments via Airtel Thanks App
Utility bill payments via Airtel Thanks App

exclusions: purchases converted to EMI post facto
payment of card fees and other card charges
utility spends not done on Airtel Thanks App
joiningBenefits: Amazon eVoucher worth Rs 500 on first transaction within 30 days of card issuance

additionalDetails: Cashback is directly credited to the credit card statement.

salaried: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-02
Cashback is credited directly to the credit card statement and not redeemed separately.
Domestic lounge access is available only if spends in the previous 3 months are at least Rs 50,000.
The card offers 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per calendar year subject to the spend condition.

25% cashback on Airtel is applicable only for recharge or bill payment of active Airtel connections via Airtel Thanks App; payments for new or inactive connections, hardware cost, installation charges, advance recharge or similar amounts are not eligible.
For bigbasket, accelerated cashback is eligible only on bigbasket and BBnow, and not on sub-brands such as the beauty store or fresho meats.
For Swiggy, accelerated cashback is eligible only on Food Delivery and Dineout, and not on Instamart or Genie.
For Zomato, accelerated cashback is eligible only on Delivery and Dining, and not on offerings such as Blinkit, District, Zomaland or Money.
Accelerated cashback each month is capped at twice the base cashback earned in the same statement month.
Preferred merchant cashback is capped at Rs 500 per month billing cycle across Swiggy, Zomato and bigbasket combined.
1% cashback on other eligible spends has no cap.
Cashback is earned basis merchant IDs / VPA IDs received from merchants, and disputes may take up to 90 days to reconcile.
Cashback is credited in the next billing cycle 3 days prior to the statement generation date.
Cashback on individual transactions is rounded down to the nearest rupee.

additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per statement cycle
Dining Delights discounts at participating restaurants
additionalDetails: Cashback is directly credited to the credit card statement within 3 days prior to statement generation in the next billing cycle.

salaried: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-02
Effective 20 June 2025, cashback on Myntra increased to 7.5% from 1%, capped at Rs 4,000 per statement quarter.
Flipkart and Cleartrip continue to earn 5% cashback, each capped at Rs 4,000 per statement quarter per merchant.
Preferred merchants earn unlimited 4% cashback and can change at the bank's discretion.
Only transactions made towards food delivery on Swiggy are eligible for accelerated cashback; Instamart and Genie are excluded.
Flipkart cashback excludes Flipkart Health and purchases of gift cards on Flipkart.
Cashback is directly credited to the credit card statement in the next billing cycle 3 days prior to the statement generation date.
Cashback is rounded down for each individual transaction.
Cashback is not applicable on transactions less than Rs 100.

name: LIC Axis Bank Platinum Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under LIC Axis Bank Platinum Credit Card terms
additionalBenefits: Nil joining fee and nil annual fee

1 Reward Point per Rs 100 on other eligible transactions

1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel purchases from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per month
Dining Delights discounts at participating restaurants
Convert purchases of Rs 2,500 or more into EMI
Wednesday Delight offers as per Axis Bank programme terms

EMI conversion available for transactions exceeding Rs 1,500
Wednesday Delight offers as per Axis Bank programme terms
